mapper.select: SELECT * FROM table_info ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM table_info WHERE datasource_id = #{datasourceId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM table_info WHERE datasource_id = #{datasourceId} AND LOWER(table_name) = LOWER(#{tableName}) ORDER BY update_time DESC, create_time DESC, id DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM table_info WHERE is_active = #{isActive} ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM table_info WHERE datasource_id = #{datasourceId} AND is_active = #{isActive} ORDER BY create_time DESC
